tasting_rooms.name: M. Chapoutier Tasting Cellar
tasting_rooms.address: 18 avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Complimentary tasting of 5 wines; premium Hermitage flights from EUR 30
tasting_rooms.description: M. Chapoutier's flagship tasting cellar at Tain-l'Hermitage, showcasing the full range from Crozes-Hermitage to iconic single-parcel Ermitage cuvees. Braille-labelled bottles displayed throughout.

verified.address_quoted: 18 avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage

tasting_rooms.name: E. Guigal Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; standard tasting EUR 25; La La wines premium tasting EUR 80
tasting_rooms.description: E. Guigal's historic cellars and tasting room in Ampuis, home of the legendary La Landonne, La Mouline and La Turque single-vineyard Côte-Rôties. Guided cellar tour with vertical tasting available.

tasting_rooms.name: Delas Freres Tasting Cellar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Standard visit EUR 15; prestige cuvee tasting EUR 35
tasting_rooms.description: Delas Freres winery and tasting space in Saint-Jean-de-Muzols offering guided visits through cellars with tastings of Saint-Joseph, Cornas and Hermitage single-parcel wines.

tasting_rooms.name: Paul Jaboulet Aine Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.address: Les Jalets, Route Nationale 7, 26600 La Roche-de-Glun, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Visit and tasting from EUR 18; La Chapelle prestige tasting EUR 45
tasting_rooms.description: The historic home of La Chapelle Hermitage, now owned by the Frey family. Cellar tours at La Roche-de-Glun cover the full Jaboulet range including the iconic Hermitage La Chapelle.

verified.address_quoted: Les Jalets, Route Nationale 7, 26600 La Roche-de-Glun

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau de Beaucastel Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; estate tasting EUR 20; Hommage a Jacques Perrin vertical EUR 75
tasting_rooms.description: The Perrin family estate in Courthezon, one of only two Chateauneuf-du-Pape estates to use all 13 permitted grape varieties. Guided tours of historic cellars with structured tastings of the estate range.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine du Vieux Telegraphe Tasting
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; La Crau vertical tasting EUR 35; Grand Tasting EUR 60
tasting_rooms.description: The Brunier family's landmark estate on La Crau plateau, one of Chateauneuf-du-Pape's finest terroirs. Cellar visits showcase the La Crau single-vineyard lineup alongside estate Gigondas and Telegramme cuvees.

tasting_rooms.name: Maison Brotte Espace Viniculture
tasting_rooms.address: Chemin de la Gironde, 84230 Chateauneuf-du-Pape, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting from EUR 10; guided cave visit and tasting EUR 22
tasting_rooms.description: Maison Brotte's purpose-built visitor centre next to the Pere Anselme Wine Museum. Wide range of Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Gigondas, Vacqueyras and Cotes du Rhone open for daily tasting.

tasting_rooms.name: Maison des Vins du Rhone Avignon
tasting_rooms.address: 6 rue des Trois Faucons, 84000 Avignon, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting from EUR 5 per glass; regional discovery flight EUR 18
tasting_rooms.description: The Rhone Valley wine trade body's urban tasting bar in Avignon's historic centre. The rotating selection spans the full Rhone Valley from Condrieu to Chateauneuf-du-Pape with over 300 references.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Clape Tasting
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment only; private cellar visit and tasting
tasting_rooms.description: The Clape family's legendary Cornas estate cellar, producing some of the Rhone's most sought-after 100% Syrah wines. Pierre-Marie Clape receives small groups by appointment for tasting from barrel and bottle.

tasting_rooms.name: Clos des Papes Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.address: 13 avenue Pierre de Luxembourg, 84230 Chateauneuf-du-Pape, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; cellar and estate tasting EUR 25
tasting_rooms.description: The Avril family's Clos des Papes in the village of Chateauneuf-du-Pape. Known for consistently scoring among the appellation's highest-rated estates, offering intimate visits to their village chai.

tasting_rooms.name: Gigondas La Cave Tasting Bar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting from EUR 6; guided flight with AOC overview EUR 20
tasting_rooms.description: The cooperative cellar shop and tasting bar in Gigondas village, offering the region's broadest access to appellation wines from over 40 local producers. The central port of call for any Gigondas visit.

tasting_rooms.name: Cave de Tain Tasting Centre
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting free; Hermitage and Cornas premium flight EUR 25
tasting_rooms.description: Cave de Tain cooperative's visitor centre and tasting room, one of Northern Rhone's largest producers. Full range from Crozes-Hermitage to Hermitage and Cornas, including the Nobles Rives prestige tier.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Yves Cuilleron Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting Mon-Sat; guided flights EUR 15 to EUR 40 for Condrieu verticals
tasting_rooms.description: Yves Cuilleron's modern winery and tasting room in Chavanay at the southern edge of Condrieu appellation. Noted for expressive Condrieu whites and structured Saint-Joseph reds from old-vine Syrah.

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau Mont-Redon Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting from EUR 10; estate tour and tasting EUR 22
tasting_rooms.description: One of the oldest and largest estates in Chateauneuf-du-Pape with a welcoming daily tasting room. The Fabre-Diffre family has owned the property since 1923, and the tasting covers both Chateauneuf-du-Pape and Lirac.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Les Pallieres Tasting
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; tasting and estate walk EUR 20
tasting_rooms.description: Historic Gigondas estate jointly owned by Brunier family of Vieux Telegraphe and Kermit Lynch. Old-vine Grenache on Triassic limestone soils produces one of Gigondas's finest expressions. Intimate appointment visits.
